testCases.title: Verify login page loads with correct URL and required controls
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully, browser URL remains http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined, and username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home button, and arrow back button are visible.

testCases.title: Verify login page input fields accept user input
testCases.expectedResult: Username textbox accepts typed input and displays entered text. Password textbox accepts input and displays masked characters.

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated successfully and the application redirects to the home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home. Login page is no longer displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect password
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
Enter IncorrectPassword into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the user remains on the login page. Browser URL stays http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined and access to the home page is not granted.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect username
steps: Enter invaliduser into the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the application remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are incorrect
steps: Enter wronguser into the username textbox
Enter wrongpassword into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected and the application keeps the user on the login page without navigation to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when username field is empty
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login is not completed and the user remains on the login page without being redirected to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when password field is empty
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is not successful and the user remains on the login page without redirection to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when both username and password fields are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected and the application remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Characters entered in the password textbox are masked and not displayed as plain text.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to home page using home button
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates to the home page and the browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to home page using back button
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates to the home page and the browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify login submission using Enter key
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
Press the Enter key on the keyboard
testCases.expectedResult: Login request is submitted and user is authenticated successfully with redirection to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with leading and trailing spaces in username
steps: Enter '  hacklarr  ' including leading and trailing spaces in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Entered value including spaces is submitted. If it does not match the stored username exactly, authentication fails and the user remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with whitespace-only values
steps: Enter only spaces in the username textbox
Enter only spaces in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the application remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify system behavior when clicking SIGN IN multiple times rapidly
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
Click the SIGN IN button multiple times quickly
testCases.expectedResult: Only one authentication request is processed and the user is redirected once to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home without duplicate navigation or application errors.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt using extremely long username and password values
steps: Enter a very long string in the username textbox
Enter a very long string in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected or handled safely and the application remains stable while keeping the user on the login page without redirecting to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login with copied and pasted credentials
steps: Copy hacklarr and paste it into the username textbox
Copy Icstunnel1 and paste it into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Credentials entered via copy and paste are accepted and the user is successfully redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.
